Bosch Limited has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone Financial Results for the period ended December 31,2012.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held on February 27, 2013 have recommended a Dividend of Rs.60 per share for the year ended December 31, 2012.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that the share transfer books of the company will remain closed from May 14, 2013 to May 27, 2013 for the purpose of dividend to be declared at the Annual General Meeting.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that Workmen of the Company's Bangalore Plant have resorted to an illegal 'Tool Down' strike w.e.f. end of first shift of March 07, 2013, without giving any prior notice to the management. Efforts are in hand to resolve the matter with the Union and restore normalcy at the earliest.

Bosch Limited had informed the Exchange that the Workmen of the Company's Bangalore Plant have resorted to an illegal 'Tool Down' strike w.e.f. end of first shift of March 07, 2013, without giving any prior notice to the management. Efforts are in hand to resolve the matter with the Union and restore normalcy at the earliest. The Company has now informed the Exchange that illegal 'Tool down' strike that was resorted to by the Workmen of Bangalore Plant has been withdrawn with effect from the night shift of March 09, 2013 based on the agreement reached between the Management and the Workmen Union.
Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that the Dividend warrants will be posted on or about June 06, 2013.
Bosch Limited has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone Financial Results along with the Limited Review Report for the period ended March 31,2013.
Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting of the Company held on June 05, 2013.
Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the outcome of Annual General Meeting of the Company held on June 05, 2013.
Bosch Limited has submitted to the Exchange a copy of the voting results for the Annual General Meeting of the Company held on June 05, 2013 under clause 35A.
Bosch Limited has submitted to the Exchange a copy of the Statement (Chairman's Speech) by Dr. A. Hieronimus, Chairman, at the Annual General Meeting of the Company held on June 05, 2013.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that A. Vijay Shankar, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, will after over 20 years of service in the Company retire at the close of office hours on June 30, 2013 upon attaining the age of superannuation.Mr. S. Karthik will succeed as  Company Secretary and Compliance Officer  (under the listing agreement) of the Company with effect from July 01, 2013.
Bosch Limited has submitted to the Exchange the Standalone Financial Results along with the Limited Review Report for the period ended June 30,2013.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that with a view to adjust production to meet the demand for products and to avoid unnecessary buildup of inventory, it is proposed to suspend the manufacturing operations at the Company's following plants : Plant locations : Date of full suspension of production lines in August 2013; Nashik Plant : 16th and 17th of August 2013; Jaipur Plant : 19th, 21st to 23rd of August 2013.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that with a view to adjust production to meet the demand for products and to avoid unnecessary build-up of inventory, it is proposed to suspend the manufacturing operations at Company's Nashik Plant for a period of 3 days on September 16, 2013, September 17, 2013 and September 19, 2013.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that with a view to adjust production to meet the demand for products and to avoid unnecessary buildup of inventory, it is proposed to suspend the manufacturing operations at company's jaipur plant for a period of 5 days on September 25, 2013, September 26, 2013, September 27, 2013, September 28, 2013 and September 30, 2013.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that with a view to adjust production to meet the demand for products and to avoid unnecessary buildup of inventory, it is proposed to suspend the manufacturing operations at the Company's following plants: 1) Location: Jaipur plant, Dates : 12th and 19th of October 2013 and 28th October to November 02, 2013 2) Location : Bangalore plant, Dates : 15th and 31st of October 2013.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that with a view to adjust production to meet the demand for products and to avoid unnecessary buildup of inventory, it is proposed to suspend the manufacturing operations at the Company's Nashik plant on the following dates: Month : October 2013  ,Dates : 21st, 22nd and 23rd:Month : November 2013,Dates : 6th and 7th.
Bosch Limited has submitted to the exchange the standalone financial results for the period ended 30-sep-2013.
Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange, vide letter dated November  15, 2013 regarding the "Notice of 'Tool Down' strike by Union and Workmen of Bangalore Plant".
Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange vide letter dated November 19, 2013, regarding "Withdrawal of 'Tool Down' strike given by Union and Workmen of Bangalore Plant".

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that at the meeting of the Board of Directors held on December 04, 2013, Mr. Franz Hauber was appointed as an Alternate Director to Mr. Peter Tyroller, Non- Executive Director w.e.f. January 01, 2014.
Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange vide letter dated December 23, 2013 regarding intimation of closure of Trading window.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that with a view to adjust production to meet the demand for products and to avoid unneccessary buildup of inventory, the manufacturing operations at Jaipur Plant have been suspended on December 30, 2013 and December 31, 2013.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that with a view to adjust production to meet the demand for products and to avoid unnecessary buildup of inventory, it is proposed to suspend the manufacturing operations at Nashik plant for a period of two days on January 27, 2014 and January 28, 2014.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors of the Company at its meeting held on February 27, 2014, inter alia, have recommended a Dividend of Rs. 55/- per Equity share for the year ended December 31, 2013 .

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that the Annual General Meeting of the Company will be held on June 05, 2014. Further the share transfer books of the company will remain closed from May 14, 2014 to May 27, 2014 (both days inclusive) for the purpose of dividend to be declared at the Annual General Meeting.
Bosch Limited has submitted to the exchange the standalone financial results for the period ended 31-Dec-2013.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that in terms of the Company's Code of Conduct framed pursuant to SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 1992, the Trading Window of the Company will remain closed from March 24, 2014 up to a period of 24 hours after the date on which unaudited financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2014 is submitted to the Stock Exchanges.

Bosch Limited had informed the Exchange regarding closing of trading window from March 24, 2014 up to a period of 24 hours after the date on which the unaudited financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2014 is submitted to the stock exchange. The Company has now informed the Exchange that the trading window will re-open on April 27, 2014.
Bosch Limited has submitted to the exchange the standalone financial results for the period ended 31-Mar-2014.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the standalone Results for the quarter ended on 31-MAR-2014 as follows: Net Sales of Rs. 243141 lacs for the quarter ending on 31-MAR-2014 against Rs. 206189 lacs and Rs. 219030 lacs for the quarters ending on 31-DEC-2013 and 31-MAR-2013 respectively. Net Profit / (Loss) of Rs. 32629 lacs for the quarter ending on 31-MAR-2014 against Rs. 13898 lacs and Rs. 25977 lacs for the quarters ending on 31-DEC-2013 and 31-MAR-2013 respectively.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors of the Company at their meeting held on June 5, 2014, approved change in financial year of the Company to commence from April 1st of every year and to end on 31st March of the following year. Consequently, as a transitionary arrangement the present financial year 2014 of the Company is being extended by three months to close at March 31, 2015. Accordingly, the financial statements for the year 2014 will be for a period of 15 months commencing from January 1, 2014 and ending on March 31, 2015.
Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a annual general meeting of the Company held on June 05, 2014.
Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange details of Voting Results pursuant to Clause 35A of listing agreement.

Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange that in terms of the Company's Code of Conduct framed pursuant to SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 1992, the Trading Window of the Company will remain closed from June 23, 2014 up to a period of 24 hours after the date on which unaudited financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2014 is submitted to the Stock Exchanges.
